name: @ts-fix/rules-module-boundaries-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of ts-fix's `module-boundaries` SYN rule category (RULE-011 deep relative import >=4 leading `..`, no-default-export, public-api-must-be-explicit). Three pure AST predicates on the @ts-fix/rules-core-effect substrate (defineRule/runRule), consuming the canonical Diagnostic/RuleMeta from @ts-fix/contracts-effect. Plain-TS visitors over the TS compiler API — NOT Effect-wrapped (sync AST walk). The GRAPH rule `no-import-cycles` is DEFERRED to the module-graph batch.
